title: Inkling: Our Open-Weights Model
summary: Inkling 是一款新发布的开源大语言模型，由 Thinking Machines 公司推出，其特点是参数规模较小但性能出色，并采用了创新的训练方法。

title: Grok Build is open source
summary: 马斯克旗下xAI公司开源了Grok-1模型的训练代码库，包含模型架构和训练细节。

title: Show HN: Firefox in WebAssembly
text:
This is the entire Firefox browser rendering to a <canvas> element. Gecko, all UI components, and the Spidermonkey JS engine are all compiled and running in WebAssembly.

Here are a few things you might find interesting:

- This is fully end to end encrypted! We use the WISP protocol for TCP-over-websockets.

- There is a novel WASM->JS JIT for experimental site speedup

- This port cost over 25k in opus/fable tokens for debugging and JIT research

This was just a fun experiment to push the boundaries of WebAssembly. For a more usable "browser in browser" experience, we also built https://github.com/HeyPuter/browser.js that eats a bit less RAM.
summary: 这是将完整Firefox浏览器编译为WebAssembly并在网页Canvas中运行的实验项目，其亮点包括端到端加密传输和创新的WASM到JS即时编译技术。

title: Running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/sec on a 13-year-old Xeon with no GPU
summary: 在13年老款至强CPU上无GPU运行Gemma 4 26B模型，实现每秒5个token的生成速度，展示了老旧硬件运行大语言模型的可能性。

title: Duskers, the scary command line game, is getting a sequel
summary: 《Duskers》是一款以命令行界面操作的恐怖生存游戏，其续作《Duskers 2.0》已正式公布，将带来全新内容和体验。

title: Brainless: Shadcn components that look like Claude Code, Codex and Grok
summary: 这是一个展示模仿 Claude、Codex 和 Grok 界面风格的 UI 组件库的网站，其看点是能快速创建类似这些 AI 产品的前端界面。

title: Voxatron
summary: Voxatron是一款基于体素（立体像素）的复古风格游戏引擎和游戏，允许玩家创建和分享类似街机风格的射击游戏，其独特之处在于完全由体素构成的动态可破坏环境。

title: Designing APIs for Agents
summary: 该帖子探讨了为AI智能体设计API时应考虑的独特挑战和最佳实践，强调需支持自主决策、处理不确定性及长期任务执行等关键能力。
